trending_videos.title: AVENGERS: DOOMSDAY TRAILER REACTION!! Doctor Doom Is Finally Here!
trending_videos.description:
X-MEN VS AVENGERS... and there is SO MUCH MORE to unpack. Greg Alba reacts to the official Avengers: Doomsday trailer for the first time, breaking down Robert Downey Jr.'s Doctor Doom, the return of Steve Rogers, Thor, Sam Wilson's Captain America, the Fantastic Four, Reed Richards, Sue Storm, Johnny Storm, Ben Grimm (The Thing), HERBIE, Professor Charles Xavier, Cyclops, Gambit, Mystique, Shang-Chi, Yelena Belova, Bucky Barnes, Scott Lang (Ant-Man), Cassie Lang, Shuri, M'Baku, Namor, and all the massive multiversal surprises leading into Avengers: Secret Wars.

Get Our New X-MEN Inspired Tee: https://www.rejectnationshop.com/

From Doom's chilling speech and Thor's warning to the destruction of the X-Mansion, the arrival of the X-Men, Fantastic Four, Wakanda, Talokan, and the shocking return of Steve Rogers with Mjolnir, this trailer has some HUGE implications for the future of the MCU.
